Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Francesca Lanpher of Keesal, Young & Logan telephone number 415-398-6000 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. and SAMUEL LOCKARD'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
